case_title: XIMENA CORDOVA VS. TONY'S GENERAL SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS NOT LISTED SERVED AUG-14-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TONY'S GENERAL SERVICES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORDOVA, XIMENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TONY'S GENERAL SERVICES INC. $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY CORDOVA, XIMENA AS TO DEFENDANT TONY'S GENERAL SERVICES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF XIMENA CORDOVA APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TONY'S GENERAL SERVICES INC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: UNABLE TO GAIN ENTRY. THIS SERVICE WAS INSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEDT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORDOVA, XIMENA AS TO DEFENDANT TONY'S GENERAL SERVICES INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.
